name: Grouper & Horseradish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced green pepper in a 9-inch pie plate and cover with plastic wrap, leaving one corner loose for venting. Microwave at high power for 2 minutes, then remove from microwave and set aside.
2. Wipe the inside of the pie plate clean. Quarter the grouper and arrange on top of the remaining pepper slices. Sprinkle with black pepper.
3. Arrange onion slices over the fish. Cover the dish loosely with plastic wrap or a lid.
4. Microwave at high power for 7-8 minutes, until the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
5. Remove from microwave and stir together the salad dressing and hot sauce in a cup. Return to microwave and heat briefly for 1 minute.
6. Spoon the sauce over the fish and garnish with lemon wedges before serving.
